review:
I was the co-host of a Meetup group last nite on the patio.  A shout out to Sabrina, our waitress. She was polite & proficient @her job!. The kitchen seemed to be overwhelmed & it took a loong time for our food to arrive, but it was tasty as usual.  I had the delicious seared Ahi tuna w/ 2 different types of house made hummus. I spoke to Malik, the mgr on duty, & he was very apologetic for the long wait.


Attn:  Kevin B., Customer Service, 
Thanks for Ur concern about our (20 diners, 2 tables) group waiting so long for our food to arrive,. I was unable to access service@pitajungle.com. U may email me @bilkanichj@yahoo.com or phone me (I'll email my phone # to U).  -Many thanks, Jeff B.
